purpose: Rotate the 13-point CdTe static smoke into the exact Novik basis, fix only the remaining discrete inter-irrep signs, apply two-radius matrix extrapolation, fit on [001] and [111], and reserve [110] as a closure holdout.

sign_convention.Gamma8: choose the unique sign giving P8 > 0
sign_convention.Gamma7: choose the unique sign giving P7 > 0

claim_boundary: Any extracted numbers are static planning-geometry method-smoke values from unconverged PBE inputs. The linear and quadratic parameter blocks are gated independently. Values in a failed block are not validated even as method-smoke parameters. No result is a reference CdTe material parameter, and no result authorizes phonon, AHC, HgTe, or alloy work.
